visual_analysis: The visual quality is below average due to a lack of engaging design elements and a very sparse layout. The text is legible, but the absence of color and design variety makes the interface feel amateurish. There is minimal visual hierarchy, with only a simple title and description that do not draw the user in or provide visual interest. The buttons, although functional, are generic and do not encourage interaction.
educational_analysis: The educational quality is also basic, with a clear but underdeveloped presentation of the concept of Amortized Analysis. While the title and description indicate a simple demonstration, there is a lack of detailed explanations, instructional scaffolding, or clear learning objectives. The content does not clearly illustrate how users can engage with the material or what they are expected to learn, limiting its pedagogical effectiveness.
